title: lazygit config and recursive git commit/push script for superrepo
body:
Adds `scripts/git-commit-push-recursive.sh` and `scripts/lazygit/config.yml` (documented in lazygit README) so maintainers can commit/push superrepo and submodules from lazygit `P` without ad-hoc shell loops.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`4fde6e0`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/4fde6e0)
- **Subject:** v0.4 changes
- **Completed:** 2026-05-26

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4 (Platform services, auth, and delivery tooling)
- **Workstream:** `repo-cicd`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-cicd-realized`

## What shipped

Adds `scripts/git-commit-push-recursive.sh` and `scripts/lazygit/config.yml` (documented in lazygit README) so maintainers can commit/push superrepo and submodules from lazygit `P` without ad-hoc shell loops.
